title: HHS - 2019 - Annual FOIA Report

field_footnotes_iv.value: * Certain information related to Quality Improvement Organizations are discussed in 42 CFR §480.139, which states the provisions of the Social Security Act §1160(a)(42 U.S.C. §1320C-9), which precludes QIOs as a Federal Agency, therefore, not subject to the FOIA.

title: DHS - 2019 - Annual FOIA Report

field_footnotes_va.value: Due to a tracking error, ICE did not account for 59,123 referrals that it received from USCIS during the reporting period.  These referrals will be accounted for in next year’s Annual FOIA Report.  ICE has taken steps to ensure accurate tracking of referrals going forward.
field_footnotes_va.processed: Due to a tracking error, ICE did not account for 59,123 referrals that it received from USCIS during the reporting period. These referrals will be accounted for in next year’s Annual FOIA Report. ICE has taken steps to ensure accurate tracking of referrals going forward.

title: CEQ - 2019 - Annual FOIA Report
field_footnotes_vb1: Data validation algorithm is incorrect.  There are 2 closed FOIA request that are not represented in either VII.C.1, 2, and 3, nor in Improper FOIA Request for Other Reason, nor in Records Not Reasonably Described.
field_footnotes_vib: Data validation error by the algorithm.  The 1 shown here is indeed less than or equal to the 1 shown in VI.C.(2).

title: FCA - 2019 - Annual FOIA Report
field_footnotes_viic1: The two FOIA requests that were processed in 21-40 day range were pending during the government-wide furlough, and we could not obtain permission from other agencies to release information that was generated in their offices of Inspector General.
